nasb.text: and will cut him in pieces and assign him a place with the hypocrites; in that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

esv.text: and will cut him in pieces and put him with the hypocrites. In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

cnv.text: 嚴厲地處罰他，使他和虛偽的人同在一起；在那裡必要哀哭切齒。”

ccb.text: 严厉地惩罚他，判他和伪君子同样的罪。他必在那里哀哭切齿。

csbs.text: 并且会严厉惩罚他，使他与那些伪善的人有同样的下场。在那里将有哀哭和切齿。
